events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need assess trench protection scenario: no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel. Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Need determine compliance. Need know OSHA trench access ladder requirements. 1926.651(c)(2): When employees are working in trenches 4 ft or more in depth, adequate means of egress (ladder, steps, ramp) shall be provided and located to require no more than 25 ft lateral travel. So no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel fails. Decision fail. Risk high/critical? Trench hazard, excavation collapse, entrapment. Could be critical because trench can be life-threatening. But maybe high. Need choose. Component conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant? The trench protection lacks access/egress. It's non-compliant. installed-defective maybe not exactly component condition; but categories include installed-defective, non-compliant. Could list non-compliant. Maybe installed-defective if trench protection system installed but missing egress. Let's include both? The prompt says component condition categories that may apply: installed-defective, non-compliant. Use empty list if none. Since missing ladder is a defect/noncompliance. Could use ["non-compliant", "installed-defective"]. Need percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value 0 (no numeric reading). Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Findings: no ladder/egress within 25 ft lateral travel in trench 4 ft or deeper. Actions: provide ladder/steps/ramp within 25 ft lateral travel; inspect; ensure egress before occupancy. Rationale: OSHA requires egress within 25 ft; none present. References: OSHA 1926.651(c)(2). Need output exactly JSON object. Ensure valid JSON.
